title: Queenshift
description: Queenshift is a governance-first bounded coding CLI and the public software counterpart to the project's bounded first architecture slice. swarmengine remains the shipped bounded engine and queenbee remains experimental.
notes: Zenodo-ready metadata for the Queenshift public software release. Keep package.json, CITATION.cff, .zenodo.json, and CHANGELOG.md aligned with the first public release tag.
